name: OZ VISION INC.
summary: OZ Vision Inc. (the “Company”) currently operates as transportation and logistics company with the ability to deliver merchandise and other items throughout the United States. The Company has had limited operations since its founding. On September 21, 2023, the Company acquired certain assets of Jebour Two Limited held by its subsidiary Fighting Leagues LV (“Fighting Leagues”).
